# Entacapone 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Entacapone 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Entacapone</strong> 目前有 <strong>3 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Entacapone 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Entacapone is indicated as an adjunct to standard preparations of levodopa / benserazide or levodopa / carbidopa for use in adult patients with Parkinson's disease and end-of-dose motor fluctuations,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>juvenile onset Parkinson disease 19A（100.0%）</li>
<li>hereditary late onset Parkinson disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>atypical juvenile parkinsonism（99.8%）</li>
<li>X-linked parkinsonism-spasticity syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>PLA2G6-associated neurodegeneration（99.8%）</li>
<li>Rasmussen subacute encephalitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>Parkinson disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>myelitis（99.6%）</li>
<li>paralysis agitans, juvenile, of Hunt（99.6%）</li>
<li>parkinsonian-pyramidal syndrome（99.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/entacapone/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
